title: Worker/reflector cycle runs end-to-end on a real project

brief.why: Validate the alternating session pattern actually works before investing in Pi extension or CC adapter
brief.what: A successful conductor.sh run on a real arc-tracked project, producing at least one worker handoff and one reflector handoff
brief.done: Ran conductor.sh, observed worker→reflector→worker, both handoffs are coherent, reflector caught something real

title: Pi harness extension enforces diminuendo and handoff

brief.why: Workers need structural enforcement for context monitoring and clean exit — skills alone are 80% reliable
brief.what: A Pi extension that monitors context usage, injects nudge prompts via sendUserMessage, and ensures handoff is written before exit
brief.done: Extension installed, worker session gets nudged at 70%, forced wrap at 85%, handoff file exists on disk after exit

title: Reflector prompt produces genuine critical review, not rubber stamp

brief.why: Sycophantic reflectors make the whole pattern worthless — the prompt must elicit honest assessment
brief.what: Tested reflector-open.md on real worker output, iterated until reflector catches real issues
brief.done: Reflector identified at least one genuine problem or improvement in a worker's output across 3 test runs
